name: Apple Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Sift together flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt; set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine sugar, eggs, oil, sour cream, and vanilla; beat well.
4. Gradually blend into the flour mixture until smooth.
5. Fold in apples and nuts.
6. Pour batter evenly into 2 greased and floured loaf pans.
7. Bake for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Makes 2 loaves.
